document: Introduction to Internet of Things Assignment-Week 9 Solutions

questions.questionText: Which of the following can be used to install OpenStack?
questions.explanation: devstack can be used to install OpenStack. (Please refer Lecture 41 @8:01)

questions.questionText: State True or False. OpenStack is an open-source software.
questions.explanation: OpenStack is an open-source software. (Please refer Lecture 41@2:14)

questions.questionText: If an OpenStack instance must connect to an external public network (for example, the Internet), which component is required between the instance and the public network?
questions.explanation: A router is initialized to connect an OpenStack instance to the public network. (Please refer Lecture 41@17:37 onwards)

questions.questionText:
Select the statement(s) that denote the limitations of WSNs.
Statement I: Procurement
Statement II: Deployment
Statement III: Maintenance
options: c. Statements I, II, and III
questions.explanation: The limitations of WSNs include procurement, deployment and maintenance. (Please refer Lecture 42@10:52)

questions.questionText: Which of the following are the actors in sensor-cloud?
questions.explanation: The actors in sensor-cloud include end users, sensor-owner and SCSP. (Please refer Lecture 42@14:18-14:24)

questions.questionText: In sensor-cloud architecture, the managerial role is played by:
questions.explanation: The Sensor-Cloud Service Provider plays the managerial role in sensor-cloud architecture. (Please refer Lecture 42@14:29)

questions.questionText: What is the function of Internal Cache in the caching-based sensor-cloud architecture?
options: b. Decides whether data should be served directly or re-cached from external cache
questions.explanation: Internal Cache handles requests from end-users and decides whether data should be provided directly or re-cached from external cache. (Please refer Lecture 43@21:06 and 22:13)
Unnecessary sensing causes energy consumption. (Please refer Lecture 43@20:54)

questions.questionText: Dynamic caching mechanism improves the flexibility and efficiency of sensor-cloud.
questions.explanation: Caching improves data movement handling and user request servicing in sensor-cloud. (Please refer Lecture 43 on Dynamic and Adaptive Data Caching mechanism)

questions.questionText: Who coined the term Fog computing?
questions.explanation: CISCO coined the term Fog computing. (Please refer Lecture 44@4:18)

questions.questionText: Fill in the blanks. Fog computing is an intermediate layer between _______ and _______.
questions.explanation: Fog computing is an intermediate layer between cloud and devices. (Please refer Lecture 44@6:40)

questions.questionText: Which of the following is/are the types of data with respect to sensitivity?
questions.explanation: Time-sensitive, less time-sensitive and not time-sensitive are types of data with respect to sensitivity. (Please refer Lecture 44@20:05)

questions.questionText: Fill in the blank. The concept of _______ enables physical hardware to be shared among multiple entities.
questions.explanation: The concept of hardware virtualization enables physical hardware to be shared among multiple entities. (Please refer to Page 262, Chapter 11, Introduction to IoT. S. Misra, A. Mukherjee, and A. Roy, 2020. Cambridge University Press.)

questions.questionText: Which of the following is/are advantages of fog computing?
questions.explanation: Fog computing supports anywhere deployability and mobility. (Please refer Lecture 45@21:21)

questions.questionText: To what are the fog nodes connected?
questions.explanation: Fog nodes are connected to both IoT devices and the cloud. (Please refer Lecture 45@11:05)
